title: falcataria moluccana
intro: Falcataria moluccana, also known as Moluccan ironwood or Falcata, is a large tree species native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which contain flavonoids, alkaloids, and saponins that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Falcataria moluccana include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting cardiovascular health. In traditional medicine, the herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
